---
title: "zealhmm"
subtitle: "Teosinte-introgression QTL recovery under low-coverage genotyping"
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  - id: zeal
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "File", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "zeal-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-snp50k"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-snp50k.qmd
        description: "DTA: JLM + MLM composite, five-caller comparison"
      - title: "zeal-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-snp50k-fdr"
        path: analysis/zeal-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-snp50k-fdr.qmd
        description: "DTA: same, FDR ≤ 0.05"
  - id: teonam
    type: table
    fields: [title, description]
    field-display-names: {title: "File", description: "Description"}
    sort: false
    contents:
      - title: "teonam-qtl-recovery"
        path: analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery.qmd
        description: "Core QTL recovery"
      - title: "teonam-qtl-recovery-118k"
        path: analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery-118k.qmd
        description: "118K OLS GWAS + JLM + coverage sweep"
      - title: "teonam-qtl-recovery-mlm-118k"
        path: analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery-mlm-118k.qmd
        description: "118K MLM (STAM)"
      - title: "teonam-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-118k"
        path: analysis/teonam-qtl-recovery-dta-mlm-118k.qmd
        description: "DTA MLM composite + five-caller sweep"
      - title: "teonam-stam-mlm-gwas-118k"
        path: analysis/teonam-stam-mlm-gwas-118k.qmd
        description: "STAM MLM Q+K (Fig 4C)"
      - title: "teonam-stam-ols-gwas-118k"
        path: analysis/teonam-stam-ols-gwas-118k.qmd
        description: "STAM OLS 118K"
      - title: "teonam-stam-mlm-gwas-interpolated"
        path: analysis/teonam-stam-mlm-gwas-interpolated.qmd
        description: "STAM MLM, interpolated panel"
      - title: "teonam-stam-ols-gwas-family-imputed"
        path: analysis/teonam-stam-ols-gwas-family-imputed.qmd
        description: "STAM OLS, family-imputed"
      - title: "teonam-genetic-map"
        path: analysis/teonam-genetic-map.qmd
        description: "Native v5 genetic map"
      - title: "marker-thinning"
        path: analysis/marker-thinning.qmd
        description: "cM marker thinning (MDdIS)"
      - title: "callers-and-methods"
        path: analysis/callers-and-methods.qmd
        description: "Ancestry callers"
      - title: "simulation-calibration"
        path: analysis/simulation-calibration.qmd
        description: "Caller calibration on simulated truth"
      - title: "rtiger_vs_nilhmm_reproduction"
        path: analysis/rtiger_vs_nilhmm_reproduction.qmd
        description: "RTIGER vs nilHMM"
      - title: "nilhmm_sanity_check_paint"
        path: analysis/nilhmm_sanity_check_paint.qmd
        description: "nilHMM painting sanity check"
      - title: "source-method-comparison"
        path: analysis/source-method-comparison.qmd
        description: "Source/method comparison"
      - title: "b1-mapping-benchmark"
        path: analysis/b1-mapping-benchmark.qmd
        description: "B1 mapping benchmark"
---

## ZEAL / BZea

::: {#zeal}
:::

## TeoNAM

::: {#teonam}
:::
